## What changed
Added a pull request template to standardize PR descriptions and improve review quality.

## Why
Without a clear structure, pull requests can be confusing and lack context.
This template ensures every PR explains what changed and how to verify it.

## How to test
1. Create a new branch.
2. Open a pull request.
3. Confirm that this template appears automatically.

## Checklist
- [ ] I ran all tests and they pass.
- [ ] I removed temporary debug statements.
